title: Notexxd out of Cloud9, v1c to return from VCL
description: Cloud9's Controller has replaced his replacement after two months away from the organization.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Nongshim, 100T fight through EWC playoff quarterfinals
description: Nongshim Redforce and 100 Thieves both defeated and eliminated Team Vitality and MIBR in 2-1 fashion in the Esports World Cup 2026 quarterfinals.
author: weivy

title: GIANTX imports neT as in-game leader
description: The North American Sentinel most recently competed with FlyQuest in Challengers.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Heretics, Gentle Mates sent home early from EWC playoffs
description: BBL and NRG will face in the semifinals.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Game Changers EMEA grand finals returns to ESA Arena
description: Tickets will go on sale on August 3.
author: ChickenJoe

title: Gen.G ushers in new era with Efina, Raxcal
description: The former F4Q, IAM player finally gets his Tier 1 shot, while an exciting rookie enters the mix for Gen.G.
author: jenopelle

title: Gen.G shuts down ZynX for the rest of 2026 due to wrist injury
description: After struggling with a wrist injury during Stage 1, Gen.G shuts down ZynX for the rest of the year to prioritize his recovery.
author: jenopelle

title: MIBR, Nongshim punch final EWC Playoff tickets
description: All Gamers and G2 bow out of the action in Paris's Group Stage.
author: jenopelle

title: C0M, Okeanos released from Evil Geniuses
description: The former LEVIATÁN duo have departed Evil Geniuses after almost two months on the bench.
author: ChickenJoe

title: BBL, NRG continue EWC 2026 journey to playoffs
description: Both BBL Esports and NRG won their first two 1-1 games of the Esports World Cup 2026 group stage, eliminating EDward Gaming and Karmine Corp.
author: weivy

title: Wolves releases jowa
description: After just Kickoff and Stage 1, Wolves parts ways with jowa.
author: jenopelle

title: DH returns to T1's main roster
author: jenopelle

title: Wolves completes its roster with Deryeon
description: The wolfpack is complete ahead of China Stage 2.
author: jenopelle

title: Heretics, Gentle Mates qualify from EWC 2026 groups
description: Team Heretics and Gentle Mates won their qualification matches for the Esports World Cup 2026 playoffs, while G2 Esports and All Gamers remained alive in groups.
author: weivy

title: 100 Thieves, Vitality secure EWC's first playoff slots
description: The Thieves and the Bees looked impressive, securing playoff spots in EWC26.
author: jenopelle
